review_notes: The functions map well to Kubernetes security features relevant to protecting internet-facing services. However, the naming of 'k8s_networkpolicy_internet_facing_protection' was slightly vague and was improved for clarity. The use of WAF with ingress controllers and security configurations in service meshes are valid approaches to enhance security.
naming_improvements: Use 'restricted' instead of 'protection' to clearly indicate the intent of the network policy
title: Requirement 11.5.1.1
step1_reasoning: The control focuses on advanced protection for internet-facing load balancers, which can be mapped to Kubernetes by ensuring that ingress controllers have Web Application Firewall (WAF) capabilities enabled, service meshes are configured for enhanced security, and network policies are applied to protect internet-facing services. These measures align with the intent of providing advanced protection similar to cloud shield services.
